c.d: How intuitive, user-friendly, and customizable the app interface is for podcast listening and discovery

c.n: Podcast Library Size and Content Variety
c.d: The number of available podcasts and range of topics or sub-topics to suit diverse user interests
Ability to synchronize playback position, subscriptions, and preferences across multiple devices
Features that enhance listening such as trim silence, volume boost, sleep timer, and ad-free modes
Availability of free usage versus premium subscription cost and benefits
Supported operating systems and devices such as iOS, Android, desktop, smart speakers
Effectiveness of curated collections and personalized podcast recommendations
